message.content:
[cron:4d1920f6-0515-4e1e-87e6-05f4ed4797bd TQP Daily Runner (fixed)] TQP_RUN: Run bash /Users/ainchorsoc2a/.openclaw/workspace/scripts/task-queue-processor.sh. This processes ONE task per run: picks up queued → dispatches, or verifies dispatched → marks done/re-queues/escalates. The script handles everything internally. No reply needed — script writes its own state. TKT-0501: if TQP escalation occurs, script uses sovereign-alert.sh (direct Bot API).
Current time: Thursday, July 16th, 2026 - 10:43 PM (Australia/Sydney)
Reference UTC: 2026-07-16 12:43 UTC

content.text: I need to run the task queue processor script as instructed by the cron job. Let me execute it.
TQP: No queued, resumable, or dispatched tasks. Exiting.

details.aggregated: TQP: No queued, resumable, or dispatched tasks. Exiting.

content.text: The task queue processor ran successfully. There were no queued, resumable, or dispatched tasks to process, so it exited cleanly. No further action needed.
